item.title: Notiqflow 0.2.1
item.description:
Notiqflow 0.2.1

  • The setup window stays put. It now floats above your other windows, so it no longer slips behind System Settings while you grant permissions.
  • Push-to-talk permission fix. When you turn on Input Monitoring, Notiqflow now offers a one-click relaunch so your shortcut activates straight away. Previously it could stay inactive — even after removing and re-adding the permission — until you restarted the app yourself.
  • Clearer setup state. The menu and setup panel no longer show as ready while your shortcut isn't actually working yet.
